method: Explicit supersession detection from commit history, changelog references, and handover documents only. No implicit or inferred supersessions recorded.

supersession_pairs.evidence: 42.23/rewiring_plan.md explicitly describes an architectural rewiring of the WOW chain, routing around the blocked 75.x interpretation layer. Prior WOW chain configuration is implicitly superseded by the rewired plan.
supersession_pairs.retained_for: lineage tracing — prior configuration is part of the WOW chain evolution record

supersession_pairs.evidence: Commit e52e389 freezes run_01 baseline and initializes run_02. run_02 is currently advancing (commits 711dd16, 3e41f2d). run_01 outputs are NOT yet superseded — they remain the authoritative baseline. Recorded for prospective tracking only.
supersession_pairs.status: PROSPECTIVE — run_01 remains authoritative until run_02 reaches equivalent stage completions
supersession_pairs.retained_for: run_01 baseline per commit e52e389 freeze

supersession_pairs.evidence: 43.1 defines binding as a first-principle specification. No prior binding artifact was found in the crawl. Recorded as IMPLICIT to acknowledge architectural decision lineage.
supersession_pairs.status: NO PRIOR ARTIFACT FOUND — this supersession is unverifiable from available evidence

not_superseded.summary: All governance documents (N-001, N-002, N-003, N-004, N-005), all runtime pipeline outputs (N-007 through N-011, N-014 through N-028, N-030, N-031), and demo surface (N-032) show no supersession evidence. These are current canonical artifacts in their respective roles.

run_transition_note: run_01 → run_02 advancement is recorded as prospective (SUP-002) only. run_01 outputs remain the locked baseline for architectural validity assessment. run_02 artifacts should be incorporated into a future A.3 consolidation pass once run_02 completes equivalent pipeline stages.
